## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed solution

How would you like Glyph to behave? UI sketch or example welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they don't fit.

## Additional context

Links to similar features in other editors, related issues, or anything else useful.
